---
title: "Statistical Geography"
subtitle: "Quantitative methods, spatial statistics, and data analysis for geographic research."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include statistical-geography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Statistical Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include statistical-geography/01-geographic-data-sources.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/02-measures-of-central-tendency-dispersion.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/03-correlation-regression.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/04-map-projections-and-scales.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/05-thematic-mapping-techniques.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/06-spatial-statistics-indices.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include statistical-geography/07-agricultural-delineation-methods.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include statistical-geography/08-hypothesis-testing.md >}}

{{< include statistical-geography/09-advanced-multivariate-techniques.md >}}

---
